lines: I'm Varun Raj, from the Web Development category.
Most startups die in WhatsApp drafts.
The idea is great. The launch never happens.
Last quarter, a Chennai founder came to me.
Hyperlocal food-tasting platform.
No team. No code. Just conviction.
3 weeks later, I shipped his MVP.
Login, listings, Razorpay checkout. All live.
He got 200 paying users before raising a single rupee.
I want to meet first-time founders sitting on real ideas,
Who need someone to actually build it. Not just talk about it.
Varun Raj. I turn founder ideas into running products.
I'm Varun Raj, from the Web Development category.
Every business owner wants free customers from Google.
Most never get them.
The site looks pretty. Google can't read it.
A Bangalore interior designer came to me last year.
Beautiful portfolio. Invisible on search.
Zero organic traffic.
I rebuilt her site for speed, structure, and search intent.
4 months later, page one for her top three keywords.
Inquiries doubled. Ad spend dropped to zero.
I want to meet service businesses tired of renting customers from Google ads.
Build the asset once. It pays you for years.
Varun Raj. Websites that earn their spot on Google.
I'm Varun Raj, from the Web Development category.
In India, trust is everything.
But if your website looks like 2008,
Customers think your business is stuck there too.
A 30-year-old family jewelry brand came to me last quarter.
Crore-level turnover. Website looked like a school project.
I rebuilt it with HD 3D product views and a secure appointment system.
Within months, three international buyers reached out.
All of them named the website as the reason.
I want to meet legacy Indian brands doing serious business,
Who still look small online.
Varun Raj. Make your website match your reputation.
I'm Varun Raj, from the Web Development category.
The biggest killer of Indian e-commerce isn't competition.
It's payment failure.
A clunky checkout loses the customer forever.
A clothing brand asked me to audit their site last month.
They were losing 25% of sales at the payment screen alone.
1 in every 4 buyers. Gone.
I rebuilt the checkout.
One-click UPI. One-tap cards.
Success rate hit 98% the next day.
If you know a retailer staring at abandoned carts every morning,
Send them to me.
Varun Raj. Smooth checkouts, better bottom lines.
I'm Varun Raj, from the Web Development category.
India's new Data Protection Act changed the game.
A leaky website isn't a tech glitch anymore.
It's a lawsuit waiting to happen.
A Coimbatore healthcare clinic came to me 6 months back.
Their site was getting hammered by SQL injection attacks.
Patient records were one breach away from a national headline.
I rebuilt the site from the ground up.
Encrypted patient data. Hardened the server.
Today their security audit reads 100%.
Their lawyers finally sleep at night.
I want to meet finance, health, and legal businesses
Who genuinely cannot afford a data leak.
Varun Raj. The most secure websites in India.
